Interface IMosaicFunction

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control mosaic function.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("2E7A3BB4-76E1-4B84-A359-68233D60450A")]
public interface IMosaicFunction
